barRaise.topFinding: Eighteenth review: nothing shipped. The working tree is byte-identical to 06-12 (same four files uncommitted, last commit 9c78081 on 06-11, version pill still 0.51.2), and the single HIGH, the partial 'Yes& Chains' brand rename in user-visible surfaces while the canonical layer still says 'YesAndChains', is unresolved: no decision superseding locked BACKLOG section 1.8 has been logged (DECISIONS_NEEDED has Decision 30 + 31, neither brand). This is a Nick-gated call, so the AI is correctly blocked, but the gate has been open a full cycle plus a weekend, and behind it sit the uncommitted 0.51.3 catch-up entry, the new web+yac boot route in src/main.ts, and three canonical-audit fixes. Verdict holds at needs-attention on the one HIGH; one more cycle of no movement tips it toward at-risk, because the cost is now two days of finished follow-through work parked behind a single unmade decision.
